artifact: Removed draw_matches from projection because the NL asks only for the league name; retained count for ordering.
sql: SELECT l.name AS league_name FROM "Match" AS m JOIN league AS l ON l.id = m.league_id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

repair_attempts.sql: SELECT l.name AS league_name, COUNT(*) AS draw_matches FROM "Match" AS m JOIN league AS l ON l.id = m.league_id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY draw_matches DESC LIMIT 1;
